featured.title: The Other Steve Schrader
featured.description: These are new and older autobiographical stories about trying to find my own way of being in the world. They are set largely in New York City where I grew up and still live, from my early childhood in Washington Heights to my adolescence, adulthood and older years on the Upper West Side. I hope these stories capture the discoveries I made along the way about who I was, and who I hoped to become.
